summary: Recording (source unknown) captures a surprisingly rippin' performance even though the setlist leaned toward sub‑par Dead favorites.
review: Both reviewers give the show high marks, noting that despite a selection of less‑inspired favorite tunes the band delivered an energetic, ‘rippin’’ performance. No specific recording issues are mentioned, suggesting the audio is at least listenable, while the brief comment about Brent’s onstage farewell adds a memorable moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (4‑ and 5‑star) highlight strong performance despite mediocre song choices; no recording complaints, but limited detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewers did not note any audio problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set featured many typical Dead favorites that some listeners found sub‑par, yet the overall energy kept the show lively and ‘rippin’'.
